//: scripts/ is the source root: top-level modules (run, config, schema, compose, evaluate, analyze, store, pipeline) and subpackages (common/, model/, viz/, mrv/) live here and import flat (e.g. `import config`, `from common.paths import ...`). The editable install (pyproject.toml) makes this resolve at runtime and for most tools; extraPaths declares it for static analyzers (pyright, serena) that read the source tree directly.
